response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio lyrics phonetically match the Japanese song 'Yoimachi Joutou' perfectly, and the spoken English dialogue segments are clearly audible. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized manual transcription and translation because reference lyrics were null. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed carefully to capture fast-paced song segments, dramatic comedic timing in dialogues, and synchronized screaming in the transitions.

subtitles.original: そこのけそこのけ 街になびく 秘め騒ぐ心から
subtitles.english: Get out of the way, get out of the way! Fluttering in the streets, from my secretly clamoring heart...

subtitles.original: 覚悟しとけよ
subtitles.english: You better prepare yourself!

subtitles.original: 段々々 ほら 音に鳴る カウントダウン
subtitles.english: Step by step, look, the sound rings out, the countdown...

subtitles.original: 狙い 狙い 痛い 痛い 日々に
subtitles.english: ...aiming, aiming at these painful days.

subtitles.original: 燦々と かます 仁義
subtitles.english: Brilliantly serving up justice!

subtitles.original: 誰も読めない 先も読めない これで勝負
subtitles.english: No one can read it, the future is unreadable, this is the showdown!

subtitles.original: バグも マスも ドレも すべて
subtitles.english: Even the bugs, the masses, whichever it is, take them all along...

subtitles.original: ツレて 満ちて 生きて 射ち抜いて 狂い咲きしよう
subtitles.english: ...and fill up, live, shoot through, let's bloom in madness!

subtitles.original: We've got a very special show! Let's go!
subtitles.english: We've got a very special show! Let's go!

subtitles.original: かったるい 事はしない
subtitles.english: I don't do tedious things.

subtitles.original: 言葉が かげり ズレない
subtitles.english: My words don't shadow or slip.

subtitles.original: 解るか？ あたしの 美学
subtitles.english: Do you understand my aesthetic?

subtitles.original: この 場で 正直な
subtitles.english: Right here, my honest...

subtitles.original: 拳 一つが
subtitles.english: ...single fist...

subtitles.original: 切り札
subtitles.english: ...is my trump card!

subtitles.original: ガナる ラッタッタ
subtitles.english: Shouting "rat-tat-tat"!

subtitles.original: 一撃 で K.O. するならば
subtitles.english: If it's a one-hit K.O., then...

subtitles.original: そら 行くぞ
subtitles.english: Here we go!

subtitles.original: Ow!
subtitles.english: Ow!

subtitles.original: Alright, Otomos, and every single grem at home, put your hands up!
subtitles.english: Alright, Otomos, and every single grem at home, put your hands up!

subtitles.original: こんな もんじゃない
subtitles.english: This isn't all I've got!

subtitles.original: 段々々 ほら 音に鳴る カウントダウン
subtitles.english: Step by step, look, the sound rings out, the countdown...

subtitles.original: 酸いも甘いも 見分けて今
subtitles.english: ...telling the sour from the sweet now.

subtitles.original: 燦々 交わる 未来を
subtitles.english: With no fear of...

subtitles.original: 恐れることもないよ 解るでしょ<
subtitles.english: ...the brilliantly intersecting future, you understand, right?

subtitles.original: 地平 線まで
subtitles.english: All the way to the horizon...

subtitles.original: 届かない
subtitles.english: ...where we can't reach,

subtitles.original: 連れて行くよ
subtitles.english: I'll take you with me,

subtitles.original: 息を抜いて 頂戴な 頂戴な
subtitles.english: so please, take a breath, please.

subtitles.original: それは皆々様、お先にバイバイっ！
subtitles.english: Well then, everyone, bye-bye for now!

subtitles.original: Gigi, I think we're done.
subtitles.english: Gigi, I think we're done.

subtitles.original: We are? Show is over. Yeah, we are finished.
subtitles.english: We are? Show is over. Yeah, we are finished.

subtitles.original: Uuuugh...
subtitles.english: Uuuugh...

subtitles.original: Are you thinking...
subtitles.english: Are you thinking...

subtitles.original: ...what I'm thinking?
subtitles.english: ...what I'm thinking?

subtitles.original: I think I am!
subtitles.english: I think I am!

subtitles.original: Oh my god. We have to do this. Write this down, write this down right now!
subtitles.english: Oh my god. We have to do this. Write this down, write this down right now!

subtitles.original: Let's bring it to the suits! Yeah!
subtitles.english: Let's bring it to the suits! Yeah!

subtitles.original: Oh my god, they're gonna love this!
subtitles.english: Oh my god, they're gonna love this!

subtitles.original: They're gonna love it!
subtitles.english: They're gonna love it!

subtitles.original: They're gonna love us! They love us. They love us!
subtitles.english: They're gonna love us! They love us. They love us!

subtitles.original: This is bad.
subtitles.english: This is bad.

subtitles.original: This is bad. (Slow-motion)
subtitles.english: This is bad. (Slow-motion)

subtitles.original: I'm going to give up on my dreams.
subtitles.english: I'm going to give up on my dreams.

subtitles.original: Don- Never give up on your dreams.
subtitles.english: Don- Never give up on your dreams.

subtitles.original: Really?
subtitles.english: Really?

subtitles.original: Yeah. I feel like... you had half a good idea.
subtitles.english: Yeah. I feel like... you had half a good idea.

subtitles.original: And you had half a good idea, too.
subtitles.english: And you had half a good idea, too.

subtitles.original: And together... That's a... We'll... ...whole good idea.
subtitles.english: And together... That's a... We'll... ...whole good idea.

subtitles.original: That's a whole good idea. We'll get the funding one day.
subtitles.english: That's a whole good idea. We'll get the funding one day.

subtitles.original: So, thank you very much, everyone, that has helped us work on all these shows together.
subtitles.english: So, thank you very much, everyone, that has helped us work on all these shows together.

subtitles.original: Oh, thank you to all of our beautiful, wonderful guests!
subtitles.english: Oh, thank you to all of our beautiful, wonderful guests!

subtitles.original: And thank you to you, grems and otomos...
subtitles.english: And thank you to you, grems and otomos...

subtitles.original: ...at home...
subtitles.english: ...at home...

subtitles.original: ...watching us today...
subtitles.english: ...watching us today...

subtitles.original: ...during our TV show!
subtitles.english: ...during our TV show!

subtitles.original: Um, please sign our petition, and look at the credits!
subtitles.english: Um, please sign our petition, and look at the credits!

subtitles.original: And don't forget, there is something else...
subtitles.english: And don't forget, there is something else...

subtitles.original: ...coming up in just a very few minutes!
subtitles.english: ...coming up in just a very few minutes!

subtitles.original: Very special!
subtitles.english: Very special!

subtitles.original: Right after this, so don't change the channel!
subtitles.english: Right after this, so don't change the channel!

subtitles.original: Don't change the channel just yet! Put down that remote, put it down.
subtitles.english: Don't change the channel just yet! Put down that remote, put it down.

subtitles.original: Yes!
subtitles.english: Yes!

subtitles.original: Gun to your head, put it down right now!
subtitles.english: Gun to your head, put it down right now!

subtitles.original: Put down the remote right now!
subtitles.english: Put down the remote right now!

subtitles.original: There is something really, really cool coming up right after this!
subtitles.english: There is something really, really cool coming up right after this!

subtitles.original: Yay!
subtitles.english: Yay!

subtitles.original: The...
subtitles.english: The...

subtitles.original: Autofister Network!
subtitles.english: Autofister Network!
